product.name: Plum&Clay Colsen Rimless Close Coupled Toilet With Soft Close Seat
product.description:
The Colsen toilet is a fantastic addition to any bathroom, offering both style and functionality. The close coupled design means that the cistern is attached to the toilet pan to form a single complete unit.

One of the standout features of the Colsen toilet is its rimless design. This design allows water to flow into every part of the toilet pan, ensuring a thorough and hygienic clean with each flush. By eliminating the traditional rim, the Colsen toilet prevents the build-up of bacteria and limescale, providing the highest level of hygiene control for your bathroom.

In addition to its cleaning capabilities, the Colsen toilet also offers an eco-flush feature. With the dual push button, you have the flexibility to choose between a full flush of 4.5L for more demanding needs or a water-saving flush of 3L for everyday use.

It comes with an angular designed soft-close toilet seat, offering some visual interest and ensuring a quiet and gentle closing motion. The quick-release hinges make cleaning a breeze, allowing you to easily remove the seat and clean hard-to-reach areas without any hassle. With the surface made from high-quality glazed ceramic, it is highly durable in addition to being easy to clean.

Furthermore, the Colsen toilet is designed to accommodate different plumbing configurations. It comes with a horizontal outlet as standard, but it can also accept a side outlet connection if needed. For added flexibility, an 'S' trap floor fitting can be used, providing versatility in installation options.

product.name: McAlpine STW85PVD Gold PVD Standard Waste for STW 1.5" Shower Traps
product.description:
The McAlpine STW85PVD is a standard waste designed for use with McAlpine STW shower traps. The waste is finished in gold PVD (Physical Vapor Deposition), which is a process that coats the surface of the waste with a thin layer of gold to give it an attractive and durable finish.

The STW85PVD waste is made from high-quality materials to ensure that it is strong, durable, and resistant to corrosion. It is designed to fit standard 1½" UK plumbing and is easy to install.

The waste is designed to be used with shower traps to prevent debris from entering the drainage system and causing blockages. It is important to ensure that the waste is installed correctly and securely to prevent any leaks from occurring.

Overall, the McAlpine STW85PVD standard waste is a high-quality and attractive option for use in shower traps. The gold PVD finish adds an extra level of style and sophistication to any bathroom, while the durable construction ensures that it will provide reliable performance for years to come.

product.name: Swell Reptiles Basking Heat Lamp 75w Screw Fitting
product.description:
Swell Basking Heat Lamps are our own range of basking bulbs designed to create heat and light in a basking area. Most reptiles require plenty of heat to bask in, mimicking the heat they would normally get from the sun in the desert or tropical environments their species originated from, and the easiest and cheapest way you can provide this is with these exclusive light bulbs from Swell.

These basking bulbs are perfect for lizard setups and snake setups, thanks to their high light and heat output which naturally enhances the colour vision of reptiles.
There is a wide selection of basking bulbs currently on the market, including bulbs from Lucky Reptile, Reptile Systems, Zoo Med and Exo Terra. However, our Swell Basking Heat Lamps efficiently tighten their light into a single focused beam which provides your reptile with the natural warmth and UVA rays that they require to stay happy and healthy. Also, as these basking bulbs are from Swell's own range, we can offer them at an unbeatable price.

While it is popular amongst some reptile keepers to use a typical domestic bulb over a basking site, these bulbs are not designed for this use and are likely to prove inefficient. A basking bulb has a flat, frosted base to create a wide area of diffused light that is less likely to harm or overheat your reptile.

Basking bulbs give off both heat and light to stimulate the metabolism of reptiles, such as Bearded dragons, and other cold-blooded animals. The heat and light aid wellbeing by helping your reptile absorb calcium and prevent metabolic bone disease.
The natural warmth provided by these screw-fitting lamps will also encourage your reptile's healthy feeding and digestion and are available in 35W, 50W, 60W, 75W, 100W and 150W sizes. The 35W, 50W, 60W and 75W are all R63 63mm diameter bulbs, while the higher wattage 100W is an R80 80mm diameter bulb and the 150W is an R95 95mm diameter bulb.

Expedition MAX DEET Mosquito Repellent offers powerful, long-lasting protection with a new and improved formula. Containing 50% DEET and enhanced with unique DermaLOC technology, it locks the repellent on the skin’s surface to deliver effective defence against both malarial and non-malarial mosquitoes. Designed for practical use in real-world conditions, Expedition MAX can be applied multiple times daily and is suitable for larger areas of exposed skin—ideal when wearing shorts and t-shirts in hot climates. 1. Apply the repellent to all exposed skin - dispense a small amount on to the palm of your hand and rub in well.

Key Points:
- To reduce the risk of bites, wear clothing so that minimal skin (such as face, neck, forearms, hands and feet) is exposed
- For a child, the repellent must be applied by an adult.
- Do not apply to the child's hand.
- Not suitable for any children under 6 years of age.

product.name: Effipro Duo Spot On Flea & Tick Treatment for Medium Dogs 10-20kg Fast Acting 4 Pipettes Vet Strength Formula Easy to Apply
product.description:
EFFIPRO DUO – Advanced Flea & Tick Protection for Medium Dogs 10-20kg

EFFIPRO DUO is the only flea and tick treatment combining PPF (pyriproxyfen) and fipronil, providing complete protection for your pet and home. It eliminates fleas and ticks while preventing the development of immature stages, offering up to 3 months of protection against flea multiplication in the environment.

Fleas in the environment are a serious concern for pets and owners. EFFIPRO DUO breaks the flea life cycle using PPF, an insect growth inhibitor, which sterilises adult fleas and stops eggs and larvae from developing. This prevents new fleas from emerging and protects your home from re-infestation.

High flea infestation rates are common – more than 70% of dogs and cats can be affected during flea season, and re-infestation is frequent, especially in cats. Even with regular treatment, many pets still carry fleas. EFFIPRO DUO provides an effective, long-term solution that keeps your pet protected and your home free of pests.

Key Benefits
• Unique Drop-Lock technology for precision application
• Provides 3 months of protection against the flea life cycle
• Sterilises adult fleas and inhibits immature stages to prevent re-infestation
• Kills fleas and ticks without the need for biting

Product Details
EFFIPRO DUO Spot-On Treatment protects your pet by targeting key stages of the flea life cycle. The dual-action formula ensures reliable results with every use. For maximum home protection, use alongside Indorex Defence Household Flea Spray, which kills hidden fleas in carpets and furnishings for up to 12 months.

Ingredients: Fipronil, Pyriproxyfen

product.name: Advantage Spot on Flea Treatment 80 for Large Cats and Rabbits - 4 Pipette
product.description:
Advantage Spot On Flea Treatment is an effective solution that can be used for both the treatment and prevention of flea infestations. Fleas are killed through contact and do not need to bite your pet to be eliminated. Advantage also kills flea larvae in the home, wherever the treated pet goes.
About Advantage
Fleas cause itching and irritation, carry diseases, and if your pet swallows one while grooming, they could get tapeworm. Only 5% of fleas live on your pet; the other 95% of their lifecycle occurs in carpets and bedding. If you discover fleas on your pet, you may need to treat your home as well.

Starts working quickly, eliminating fleas within 24 hours and continuing to protect cats for up to 4 weeks and rabbits for up to one week.

Once applied, Advantage spreads quickly across your pet's skin and coat. The product is not absorbed into the body or bloodstream, meaning that fleas do not have to bite to be eliminated.

How to Use
Advantage is a spot-on formulation. For large cats and rabbits, the contents of the pipette are applied directly to the skin by parting the fur at the base of the skull.

Instructions:
Use the Advantage product that is suitable for the weight of your pet.
Hold the tube in an upright position and twist and pull the cap to remove it. Use the reversed cap to twist and remove the seal from the tube.
For large cats and rabbits, apply the spot-on treatment to the back of the pet's neck at the base of the skull. Part the fur until the skin is visible and squeeze firmly to empty the contents of the tube. Applying the product to the base of the skull will minimise the opportunity for the pet to lick the treatment.
Administration Guide:
For large cats and pet rabbits over 4kg in body weight, use 1 pipette of Advantage Spot-On Flea Treatment for Large Cats and Rabbits Over 4kg (80mg).

Ingredients:
Contains Imidacloprid 80 mg/pipette.
